name: CARE Kutumba
description: Kutumba integration plugin for CARE. Enables integration with Karnataka's Kutumba family database system for patient identification and demographic data exchange.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_kutumba_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.label: App base URL
appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

mandatory.label: BPL tag ID
mandatory.description: Tag ID applied for Kutumba rc_type values BPL and PHH. Source from /api/v1/tag_config/.

mandatory.label: APL tag ID
mandatory.description: Tag ID applied for Kutumba rc_type values APL and NPHH. Source from /api/v1/tag_config/.

mandatory.label: RC number identifier ID
mandatory.description: Patient identifier config ID where the Kutumba ration card number is stored.

defaults.label: Auto-submit on fill
defaults.description: Auto-submit the registration form after filling from Kutumba. Set to "true" to enable.

optional.label: Health ID identifier ID
optional.description: Optional, not used in production. Patient identifier config ID for storing the Kutumba Health ID. Leave blank to skip.

optional.label: Education ID identifier ID
optional.description: Optional, not used in production. Patient identifier config ID for storing the Kutumba Education ID. Leave blank to skip.

optional.label: Student (unverified) tag ID
optional.description: Exploratory, not used in production. Tag applied silently when a Kutumba member has an education_id.

optional.label: PWD (unverified) tag ID
optional.description: Exploratory, not used in production. Tag applied silently when a Kutumba member has a disability_applicant_no.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.

standardConfigurations.title: Production
standardConfigurations.description: Production configuration for care_kutumba_fe with the minimum required environment variables.

appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

mandatory.description: Tag ID applied for Kutumba rc_type values BPL and PHH. Source from /api/v1/tag_config/.

mandatory.description: Tag ID applied for Kutumba rc_type values APL and NPHH. Source from /api/v1/tag_config/.

mandatory.description: Patient identifier config ID where the Kutumba ration card number is stored.

defaults.label: Auto-submit on fill
defaults.description: Auto-submit the registration form after filling from Kutumba. Set to "true" to enable.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.

rawSetup.title: Raw setup
rawSetup.description: Start with a minimal plug_config and edit it directly.
